body_transformation: The rounded head retains its leafy structure but now features delicate, translucent petals in soft pastel pink and ivory white, with crystalline veins running through each petal. The compact body skin transforms into a smooth, satin-like texture with a subtle lavender sheen, replacing the plant-like texture. The curled tail tip gains a soft, feathery fringe of petal-like strands that shimmer with starlight silver, while the pointed leafy ears become rounded petal flaps with a gentle shimmer. The short stubby legs now have delicate, rounded foot pads in petal gold, maintaining the original proportions.
signature_feature: Leafy head: translucent pastel pink petals with crystalline veins and starlight silver shimmer.
